commands.review_summary:
The PR adds defensive Tool Search catalog snapshots that skip tools whose descriptor fields throw and extends tool-search tests for unreadable plugin and client schemas.

PR surface: Source +87, Tests +90. Total +177 across 2 files.

Reproducibility: yes. Current main directly dereferences descriptor fields while building Tool Search catalog entries, so an unreadable parameters accessor can abort that source path; I did not run tests because this review is read-only.
commands.review_followup: - [P2] This draft maintainer PR has no mechanical code finding for ClawSweeper to repair; maintainers should finish review, wording cleanup, CI/Testbox proof, and undraft when ready.

target.title: fix(agents): skip unreadable tool-search entries
target.body:
## Summary
- Skip tool-search catalog entries whose descriptor fields cannot be safely read.
- Keep healthy sibling tools cataloged when one plugin/client tool has an unreadable schema accessor.
- Leave uncatalogable client tools visible instead of silently dropping them from the request surface.

## Verification
- `node scripts/run-vitest.mjs src/agents/tool-search.test.ts -- --reporter=dot`
- `./node_modules/.bin/oxfmt --check --threads=1 src/agents/tool-search.ts src/agents/tool-search.test.ts`
- `git diff --check`
- `.agents/skills/autoreview/scripts/autoreview --mode local --no-web-search`
- Remote changed gate: pending

## Real behavior proof
Behavior addressed: tool-search catalog construction no longer aborts when one target tool exposes an unreadable `parameters` accessor.
Real environment tested: local macOS checkout with Node 24 via repo Vitest wrapper; AWS Crabbox pending.
Exact steps or command run after this patch: `node scripts/run-vitest.mjs src/agents/tool-search.test.ts -- --reporter=dot`
Evidence after fix: focused tool-search suite passed 26 tests, including the new unreadable-schema regression.
Observed result after fix: the malformed tool is skipped from the catalog, the valid sibling remains searchable, and the control tool stays visible.
What was not tested: full changed gate is pending remote Crabbox proof.
target.author: vincentkoc
